list.vod_blurb: Jaded detective John Verney is on the trail of an ancient cult of Plague Doctors which is cutting a
list.vod_content: Jaded detective John Verney is on the trail of an ancient cult of Plague Doctors which is cutting a bloody swathe through the London underworld. Dismissed by his superiors as gang on gang killings, the murders draw Verney into an obsessive maze of a secret society conspiracy with links to the Jack The Ripper murders of 1888, putting him and his family in grave danger. Above is ...

list.vod_blurb: The worst is yet to come, despite Joel's belief that his troubles are finished after getting his
list.vod_content: The worst is yet to come, despite Joel's belief that his troubles are finished after getting his mother in a care facility for dementia. It goes deeply into issues of love, friendship, and the fear that everyone has of losing themselves.

list.vod_blurb: A poor girl who was married to a wealthy nobleman. In contrast to her expectation of the wealthy, th
list.vod_content: A poor girl who was married to a wealthy nobleman. In contrast to her expectation of the wealthy, the girl soon discovers the demonic truth of the family, the secret to their wealth.

list.vod_blurb: The circumstances behind a missing teenage girl spirals out of control after her traumatized father
list.vod_content: The circumstances behind a missing teenage girl spirals out of control after her traumatized father and a determined detective search for answers.

list.vod_blurb: When a group of scientists developing an engine for interstellar travel see their funding cut after
list.vod_content: When a group of scientists developing an engine for interstellar travel see their funding cut after a fatal disaster, the disgraced group must resort to criminal activity to finance their operation as they rebuild their space time device.
